## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.9

### Cameras
- Restores the normal Motion binary sensor for cameras when X-Sense reports the real `isMoved` state.
- Keeps the camera Motion Detection setting separate from the Motion state sensor.
- Prevents generic camera history records from being treated as Motion unless the record includes an APK-backed motion marker.

### Blueprints
- Adds an optional tap target to the camera event blueprint so mobile notifications can open a Home Assistant path or entity more-info page.
- Documents that the blueprint can use either camera Motion or AI Detection event entities.

### Documentation
- Updates the camera notification docs across the language README files to explain Motion events, AI Detection events, and notification tap targets.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for camera `isMoved` Motion binary sensors.
- Adds regression coverage so camera history records do not default to Motion.
- Adds regression coverage for the blueprint notification tap target.
